{"problem_standardized_math":"Show that the Newton update\n\\[\n\\lambda^{(\\ell+1)}=\\lambda^{(\\ell)}-\\frac{\\phi_2(\\lambda^{(\\ell)})}{\\phi_2'(\\lambda^{(\\ell)})}\n\\tag{4.43}\n\\]\nis equivalent to\n\\[\n\\lambda^{(\\ell+1)}=\\lambda^{(\\ell)}+\\left(\\frac{\\|p_\\ell\\|}{\\|q_\\ell\\|}\\right)^2\\left(\\frac{\\|p_\\ell\\|-\\Delta}{\\Delta}\\right).\n\\tag{4.44}\n\\]\nUse\n\\[\n\\|p(\\lambda)\\|^2=\\sum_{j=1}^n\\frac{(q_j^Tg)^2}{(\\lambda_j+\\lambda)^2}\n\\tag{4.39}\n\\]\nand the identities\n\\[\n\\frac{d}{d\\lambda}\\left(\\frac{1}{\\|p(\\lambda)\\|}\\right)=\\frac{d}{d\\lambda}\\left(\\|p(\\lambda)\\|^2\\right)^{-1/2}=-\\frac{1}{2}\\left(\\|p(\\lambda)\\|^2\\right)^{-3/2}\\frac{d}{d\\lambda}\\|p(\\lambda)\\|^2,\n\\]\n\\[\n\\frac{d}{d\\lambda}\\|p(\\lambda)\\|^2=-2\\sum_{j=1}^n\\frac{(q_j^Tg)^2}{(\\lambda_j+\\lambda)^3},\n\\]\nand\n\\[\n\\|q\\|^2=\\|R^{-T}p\\|^2=p^T(B+\\lambda I)^{-1}p=\\sum_{j=1}^n\\frac{(q_j^Tg)^2}{(\\lambda_j+\\lambda)^3}.\n\\]"}
